bullets: SUPER FAST - With speeds up to 25 km/h, this RPM Ultimate Racer is the true speed machine!
HOURS OF FUN - With a run time of at least 30 mins and a rechargeable battery, this Ultimate Racer offers hours of fun!
SUPER STRONG - This racer comes with exo-skeleton bumpers to the front and rear protecting it from any bumps and crashes when out cruising!
SUPER COOL - With a cool LED glow around the wheels and bright neon design, this slick RC is sure to stand out from the crowd!
REAL PERFORMANCE MACHINES - Bladez RPM perfectly blends high performance with style making it perfect for kids and adults alike!
content.description: The Bladez RPM 1:10 Ultimate Racer is an extra-large full control RC ultimate racer that has Exo-Guard Armour to protect it from even the most gnarly collisions! Reaching speeds of up to 25kmph, LED wheels and real rubber tyres, this is the ultimate real performance machine.

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 x Radio Control Monster Truck, 1 x Handset Controller, 1 x Rechargeable Li-ion Battery, 1 x USB Charging Cable, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
